activities.name: Zumba
activities.description: A dance-fuelled cardio party that torches calories while you have way too much fun. No rhythm required — just follow the beat.

activities.name: Pound Fit
activities.description: Drumstick-driven full-body cardio blending rhythm, conditioning, and core work into one electric session.

activities.name: MB Tabata
activities.description: Short, explosive 20-on / 10-off intervals engineered for maximum fat burn and afterburn in minimal time.

activities.name: MB Circuit Training
activities.description: Station-to-station conditioning that builds total-body power and endurance with strength, cardio, and functional moves.

activities.name: MB Boxing
activities.description: Punch, jab, and footwork drills on the pads and bags for a powerful, stress-busting, full-body sweat.

activities.name: MB Body Shape
activities.description: Targeted resistance toning to sculpt, define, and strengthen every major muscle group, rep by rep.

activities.name: MB Core Blast
activities.description: Focused abdominal and core work for a stable, strong, and balanced midsection that powers everything else.

activities.name: Yoga
activities.description: Breath, flow, and flexibility to restore balance, release tension, and calm the mind after a hard week.
